name: Sheet
gotchas: No inner scroll container by default — the panel is a flex-col, so a long body overflows the viewport. Wrap the scrollable region in flex-1 overflow-y-auto, or use OverlayForm which bakes that in.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger and content that make up the sheet (typically a SheetTrigger plus a SheetContent).

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Whether the sheet panel is open. Controlled together with OpenChanged.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, swipe, backdrop click, or a SheetClose trigger).

parameters.name: OnBeforeClose
parameters.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, X button, or a SheetClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").

parameters.name: IsOpen
parameters.description: Obsolete alias for Open; will be removed in a future release.

parameters.name: IsOpenChanged
parameters.description: Obsolete alias for OpenChanged; will be removed in a future release.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, swipe, backdrop click, or a SheetClose trigger).

events.name: OnBeforeClose
events.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, X button, or a SheetClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").

events.name: IsOpenChanged
events.description: Obsolete alias for OpenChanged; will be removed in a future release.

records.name: SheetContext
records.signature: SheetContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string TitleId, string DescriptionId, Func<string, Task<bool>> TryDismiss, SheetDescriptionRegistry DescriptionRegistry = null!, Action RegisterDescription = null!, Action UnregisterDescription = null!)

examples.title: Default (Right)
examples.code:
<Sheet @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <SheetTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Sheet</Button>
    </SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent>
        <SheetHeader>
            <SheetTitle>Edit Profile</SheetTitle>
            <SheetDescription>Make changes to your profile here.</SheetDescription>
        </SheetHeader>
        <Grid Columns="4" Gap="4" Class="items-center py-4">
            <Label Class="text-right">Name</Label>
            <Input Class="col-span-3" Value="John Doe" />
        </Grid>
        <SheetFooter>
            <SheetClose>
                <Button>Save Changes</Button>
            </SheetClose>
        </SheetFooter>
    </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
}

examples.title: Side Variations
examples.code:
<Sheet @bind-Open="_isTopOpen">
    <SheetTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Top</Button>
    </SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent Side="Lumeo.Side.Top">
        <SheetHeader>
            <SheetTitle>Top Sheet</SheetTitle>
            <SheetDescription>This sheet slides in from the top.</SheetDescription>
        </SheetHeader>
    </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

<Sheet @bind-Open="_isLeftOpen">
    <SheetTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Left</Button>
    </SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent Side="Lumeo.Side.Left">
        <SheetHeader>
            <SheetTitle>Left Sheet</SheetTitle>
            <SheetDescription>This sheet slides in from the left.</SheetDescription>
        </SheetHeader>
    </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

examples.title: Sizes
Prevent Close
examples.code:
<Sheet @bind-Open="_preventSheetOpen">
    <SheetTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Open Protected Sheet</Button>
    </SheetTrigger>
    <SheetContent PreventClose="true">
        <SheetHeader>
            <SheetTitle>Protected Sheet</SheetTitle>
            <SheetDescription>This sheet cannot be dismissed by clicking outside.</SheetDescription>
        </SheetHeader>
        <Stack Gap="4" Class="py-4">
            <Button OnClick="@(() => _preventSheetOpen = false)">Close Sheet</Button>
        </Stack>
    </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

@code {
    private bool _preventSheetOpen;
}

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's content (typically close-button label or icon markup).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger's root element.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The panel's content (typically a SheetHeader, body, and SheetFooter).

parameters.name: Side
parameters.description: Edge of the viewport the panel slides in from / anchors to. Defaults to Right. Mirrored under RTL so a "Right" sheet visually anchors to the start edge.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Panel width (Left/Right sides) or height (Top/Bottom sides). Defaults to Default. Superseded by SizePreset when that is set.

parameters.name: SizePreset
parameters.description: Alternative to Size that accepts the unified Size token. When set (non-null), wins over Size. Mapping: Sm→Sm, Md→Default, Lg→Lg, Xl→Xl. Full has no Size equivalent (Full is a layout intent, not a scale) — set Size directly for that case. Closes the Lumeo.Size ↔ per-component-enum overlap from #87.2.

parameters.name: Animation
parameters.description: How the sheet enters/leaves. Slide (default) animates from the configured Side. Fade uses a simple opacity tween — useful in dense forms where popovers and animations compete. None disables the animation entirely.

parameters.name: PreventClose
parameters.description: When true, disables the backdrop click, Escape key and (per ShowCloseButton) default X-button dismiss paths, so the sheet can only be closed programmatically.

parameters.name: ShowCloseButton
parameters.description: Whether the top-end close (X) button renders. null (default) keeps the legacy coupling — X shows whenever PreventClose is false. true forces the X on a modal sheet (backdrop/Escape stay disabled; the X routes through the dismiss guard); false hides it. Mirrors OverlayOptions.ShowCloseButton for service sheets.

parameters.name: SwipeToClose
parameters.description: When true, the sheet can be dismissed by swiping in the direction opposite to its Side (e.g. swipe-down on a Bottom sheet). Default false to avoid conflicts with scrollable content. Wire to true only when the sheet's content fits without scrolling.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel.

parameters.name: ZIndex
parameters.description: Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel (ignored when rendered as a nested passthrough inside an OverlayProvider shell).

enums.name: SheetSize
enums.description: Sheet sizes. Full is layout-intent (entire viewport), not a scale value, so this enum is intentionally NOT replaced by Size in 3.0.

gotchas: No inner scroll container by default — the panel is a flex-col, so a long body overflows the viewport. Wrap the scrollable region in flex-1 overflow-y-auto, or use OverlayForm which bakes that in.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The description text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-describedby on the panel once this component registers with the sheet.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description:
Additional CSS classes merged onto the description

.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description:
Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the description

.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Footer content, typically the sheet's action buttons.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the footer container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the footer container.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Header content, typically a SheetTitle and SheetDescription.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the header container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the header container.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The title text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-labelledby on the panel (the accessible name of the role="dialog" sheet).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the title <h2>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the title <h2>.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set).

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot a cooperating child (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot) folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal: one DOM node, no nested-interactive markup. Prefer a <button> child (a <Button Href> link activates on Enter only, not Space). Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger wrapper (or the TriggerSlot's class when AsChild is set).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger wrapper (or merges into the TriggerSlot's attributes when AsChild is set).

slots.description: The trigger and content that make up the sheet (typically a SheetTrigger plus a SheetContent).

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The trigger's content (typically close-button label or icon markup).

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The panel's content (typically a SheetHeader, body, and SheetFooter).

slots.description: The description text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-describedby on the panel once this component registers with the sheet.

slots.description: Footer content, typically the sheet's action buttons.

slots.description: Header content, typically a SheetTitle and SheetDescription.

slots.description: The title text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-labelledby on the panel (the accessible name of the role="dialog" sheet).

slots.description: The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set).

slots.name: ChildContentSlot
slots.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

mdSummary:
# Sheet

Slide-in side panel from left/right/top/bottom.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/sheet

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Sheet | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The trigger and content that make up the sheet (typically a SheetTrigger plus a SheetContent). |
| Sheet | Open | `bool` | `false` | Whether the sheet panel is open. Controlled together with OpenChanged. |
| Sheet | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, swipe, backdrop click, or a SheetClose trigger). |
| Sheet | OnBeforeClose | `EventCallback<DismissEventArgs>` | `` | Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, X button, or a SheetClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close"). |
| Sheet | IsOpen | `bool` | `false` | Obsolete alias for Open; will be removed in a future release. |
| Sheet | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Obsolete alias for OpenChanged; will be removed in a future release. |
| SheetClose | Context | `Sheet.SheetContext` | `default!` |  |
| SheetClose | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The trigger's content (typically close-button label or icon markup). |
| SheetClose | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger's root element. |
| SheetClose | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger's root element. |
| SheetContent | Context | `Sheet.SheetContext` | `default!` |  |
| SheetContent | Shell | `OverlayShellMarker?` | `` |  |
| SheetContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The panel's content (typically a SheetHeader, body, and SheetFooter). |
| SheetContent | Side | `Lumeo.Side` | `Lumeo.Side.Right` | Edge of the viewport the panel slides in from / anchors to. Defaults to Right. Mirrored under RTL so a "Right" sheet visually anchors to the start edge. |
| SheetContent | Size | `SheetSize` | `SheetSize.Default` | Panel width (Left/Right sides) or height (Top/Bottom sides). Defaults to Default. Superseded by SizePreset when that is set. |
| SheetContent | SizePreset | `Lumeo.Size?` | `` | Alternative to Size that accepts the unified Size token. When set (non-null), wins over Size. Mapping: Sm→Sm, Md→Default, Lg→Lg, Xl→Xl. Full has no Size equivalent (Full is a layout intent, not a scale) — set Size directly for that case. Closes the Lumeo.Size ↔ per-component-enum overlap from #87.2. |
| SheetContent | Animation | `SheetAnimation` | `SheetAnimation.Slide` | How the sheet enters/leaves. Slide (default) animates from the configured Side. Fade uses a simple opacity tween — useful in dense forms where popovers and animations compete. None disables the animation entirely. |
| SheetContent | PreventClose | `bool` | `false` | When true, disables the backdrop click, Escape key and (per ShowCloseButton) default X-button dismiss paths, so the sheet can only be closed programmatically. |
| SheetContent | ShowCloseButton | `bool?` | `` | Whether the top-end close (X) button renders. null (default) keeps the legacy coupling — X shows whenever PreventClose is false. true forces the X on a modal sheet (backdrop/Escape stay disabled; the X routes through the dismiss guard); false hides it. Mirrors OverlayOptions.ShowCloseButton for service sheets. |
| SheetContent | SwipeToClose | `bool` | `false` | When true, the sheet can be dismissed by swiping in the direction opposite to its Side (e.g. swipe-down on a Bottom sheet). Default false to avoid conflicts with scrollable content. Wire to true only when the sheet's content fits without scrolling. |
| SheetContent | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the panel. |
| SheetContent | ZIndex | `int` | `OverlayService.BaseZIndex` | Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay. |
| SheetContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the panel (ignored when rendered as a nested passthrough inside an OverlayProvider shell). |
| SheetContent | ScopedDirection | `LayoutDirection?` | `` |  |
| SheetDescription | Context | `Sheet.SheetContext` | `default!` |  |
| SheetDescription | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The description text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-describedby on the panel once this component registers with the sheet. |
| SheetDescription | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the description \<p\>. |
| SheetDescription | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the description \<p\>. |
| SheetFooter | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Footer content, typically the sheet's action buttons. |
| SheetFooter | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the footer container. |
| SheetFooter | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the footer container. |
| SheetHeader | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Header content, typically a SheetTitle and SheetDescription. |
| SheetHeader | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the header container. |
| SheetHeader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the header container. |
| SheetTitle | Context | `Sheet.SheetContext` | `default!` |  |
| SheetTitle | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The title text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-labelledby on the panel (the accessible name of the role="dialog" sheet). |
| SheetTitle | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the title \<h2\>. |
| SheetTitle | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the title \<h2\>. |
| SheetTrigger | Context | `Sheet.SheetContext` | `default!` |  |
| SheetTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set). |
| SheetTrigger | ChildContentSlot | `RenderFragment<TriggerSlot>?` | `` | Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo \<Button\> children need only AsChild. |
| SheetTrigger | AsChild | `bool` | `false` | When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot a cooperating child (a Lumeo \<Button\>, or a manual ChildContentSlot) folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal: one DOM node, no nested-interactive markup. Prefer a \<button\> child (a \<Button Href\> link activates on Enter only, not Space). Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper. |
| SheetTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger wrapper (or the TriggerSlot's class when AsChild is set). |
| SheetTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the trigger wrapper (or merges into the TriggerSlot's attributes when AsChild is set). |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Sheet) — The trigger and content that make up the sheet (typically a SheetTrigger plus a SheetContent).
- `ChildContent` (SheetClose) — The trigger's content (typically close-button label or icon markup).
- `ChildContent` (SheetContent) — The panel's content (typically a SheetHeader, body, and SheetFooter).
- `ChildContent` (SheetDescription) — The description text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-describedby on the panel once this component registers with the sheet.
- `ChildContent` (SheetFooter) — Footer content, typically the sheet's action buttons.
- `ChildContent` (SheetHeader) — Header content, typically a SheetTitle and SheetDescription.
- `ChildContent` (SheetTitle) — The title text, exposed to assistive tech via aria-labelledby on the panel (the accessible name of the role="dialog" sheet).
- `ChildContent` (SheetTrigger) — The trigger's content, rendered inside the wrapper (or forwarded into ChildContentSlot when AsChild is set).
- `ChildContentSlot` (SheetTrigger) — Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo \<Button\> children need only AsChild.

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Fires whenever the open state changes (trigger click, Escape, swipe, backdrop click, or a SheetClose trigger).
- `OnBeforeClose` (`EventCallback<DismissEventArgs>`) — Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape, backdrop click, swipe gesture, X button, or a SheetClose trigger). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "outside", "swipe", "close").
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Obsolete alias for OpenChanged; will be removed in a future release.

## Sub-components
- `SheetClose`, `SheetContent`, `SheetDescription`, `SheetFooter`, `SheetHeader`, `SheetTitle`, `SheetTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Sheet.SheetContext`)
- `Shell` (`OverlayShellMarker?`)
- `ScopedDirection` (`LayoutDirection?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `ThemeService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleKeyDown handles Enter in SheetClose.razor
- `Space` — HandleKeyDown handles Space in SheetClose.razor
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in SheetContent.razor

## Example
```razor
<Sheet />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Sheet/Sheet.razor`
- `UI/Sheet/SheetClose.razor`
- `UI/Sheet/SheetContent.razor`
- `UI/Sheet/SheetDescription.razor`
- `UI/Sheet/SheetFooter.razor`
- `UI/Sheet/SheetHeader.razor`
- `UI/Sheet/SheetTitle.razor`
- `UI/Sheet/SheetTrigger.razor`
